main.description: An answer posted through meyasuat, recorded in the box owner's own repo.

subject.description: DID of the asker, if the question was sent with the sender's handle shared.

question.description: Text snapshot of the question being answered.

questionRef.description: Optional strong reference to the asker's own com.suibari.meyasuat.question record, when one exists.

url.description: Link to the meyasuat message page.
